name: Task 2: Off-by-One Retry Bug
alert_message: HIGH: Upstream health checks are failing intermittently because the retry path appears to stop one attempt too early. Inspect the logs, repair the retry logic, and document the incident in RCA.md.

regex_checks.message: Retry loop still stops one attempt early.
RCA.md must include a Root Cause section.
RCA.md must include a Fix Applied section.
